expected_subtasks.title: Collect department budget requests
expected_subtasks.description: Gather requests from Engineering, Product, Design

expected_subtasks.title: Analyze current year spending
expected_subtasks.description: Review actuals vs budget for current year

expected_subtasks.title: Project headcount costs
expected_subtasks.description: Calculate salaries, benefits, and hiring costs

expected_subtasks.title: Estimate infrastructure and license costs
expected_subtasks.description: Project cloud, software, and tool costs

what_good_breakdown_looks_like: 5-6 subtasks covering data collection, analysis, projection, modeling, review.
acceptable_variation: May have 5-7 subtasks. Must include data collection and review.
notes: Complex financial task. Must include data gathering, analysis, and review.
